category_sources: Official WasmEdge docs describe WasmEdge guides for developing and embedding Wasm applications.
source_facts.description says WasmEdge is a lightweight, high-performance, extensible WebAssembly runtime.
display_name_sources: Official docs and repository use the WasmEdge name.
docs_sources: Official WasmEdge site hosts developer guides at https://wasmedge.org/docs/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/WasmEdge/WasmEdge; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official docs mention cloud, edge devices, Wasm apps, and sandboxed execution.
